key.name: disabled-widgets
key.summary: Widget ids the user has turned off
key.description: List of widget ids (matching metadata.json "id") that are discovered but currently disabled by the user via the Control Center (task 05). Anything discovered and NOT in this list is enabled by default.

key.name: requested-widget-id
key.summary: Widget id to deep-link the Control Center to on next open
key.description: Transient IPC hint (2026-07-20, task 12 real-hardware fix), NOT a widget config value — see the note at the top of this file about this schema never gaining per-widget keys; this one identifies which widget's settings page to jump to, it doesn't configure any widget itself. Written by extension.js's Edit Mode "Settings" action (widgetEditMode.js) right before calling Extension.openPreferences(), since that call takes no arguments and prefs.js runs in a separate process — GSettings is the one channel both processes already share (same trick disabled-widgets/ dev-mode use for live sync). prefs.js reads this back out once its window is built and clears it back to '' immediately after, so a later manually-opened Control Center window doesn't jump anywhere.

key.name: dev-mode
key.description: Used by task 08 (hot-reload-dev-mode) to watch widget folders for changes instead of requiring a full shell restart, AND (added 2026-07-19) gates lib/logger.js's debug() calls throughout the extension - turning this on makes internal state (Edit Mode flips, drag start/stop, back-actor construction, etc) visible in `journalctl`, off by default so normal use stays quiet.
